calendar.matters:
Petition For Construction Of Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Apr-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Theodore Hellman for the Petitioners.

Mr. Hellman submitted a revised order reflecting that Probate Code 21205(a) and (b) both applied. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Jackson.
